subcodes.title: Letter to Aqa Muhammad Husayn Ardistani
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth, etc. He is the Most Mighty. After the basmala God testifieth, etc. So testify that there is no god but Him, the Help-in-Peril, the Self-Subsisting
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الاکبر. شهد الله الخ هو الاعظم بعد البسملة شهد الله الخ فلتشهدن علی انه لا اله الا هوالمهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
